ddls:
CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the instrument */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the diagnostic platform */,
  "technology_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the technology used in the instrument */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Unique model number for each instrument */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number for each instrument */,
  "multiplex_capabilities" TEXT /* Multiplex capabilities of the instrument */,
  "system_type" TEXT /* Type of system (open or closed) */,
  "FDA_cleared_tests" TEXT /* FDA-cleared tests that can be performed on the instrument */,
  "level_of_automation" TEXT /* Level of automation for the instrument */,
  "throughput" TEXT /* Throughput of the instrument */,
  "turnaround_time" TEXT /* Turnaround time for test results */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the instrument was purchased */,
  "warranty_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the warranty for the instrument expires */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the instrument */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "calibration_status" TEXT /* Current calibration status of the instrument */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruments_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruments_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruments_technology_id FOREIGN KEY ("technology_id") REFERENCES technologies ("technology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the manufacturer */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the manufacturer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the manufacturer */,
  "support_email" TEXT /* Email address for technical support */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the manufacturer was established */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the diagnostic platform */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the platform */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the platform */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technologies" (
  "technology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technology */,
  "technology_name" TEXT /* Name of the technology */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the technology */,
  "patent_information" TEXT /* Information about any patents related to the technology */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the technology */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "FDA_cleared_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the FDA-cleared test */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instrument that can perform the test */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the test */,
  "test_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the test */,
  "test_throughput" TEXT /* Throughput of the test */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_FDA_cleared_tests_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the head of the department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being used */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department using the instrument */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the instrument was used */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the instrument (e.g., in use, available) */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Name of the operator who used the instrument */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the operator */,
  "usage_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the instrument usage */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test performed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_usage_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES FDA_cleared_tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_usage_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_usage_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)
